title: Gemperience
description: A mod that adds gem grinding and a lot of ores!
body:
![Gemperience updated logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30b54bfcf9ae8a8426a272f7485447fbef57274d.png)
<hr>

**This mod tries to keep things simple: Find gems around the minecraft world! From the peaks of the Minecraft mountains, to the depths of the nether, grind them for rewards!**

[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/U7U2D33EU)

[Join the discord!](https://discord.gg/3WJfUvPkTF)

# Disclaimer
1.20.2, 1.20.3 have been discontinued for the time being due to low download counts.
1.20.5 and above have a lot of changes when it comes to modloader code, so they will take extensive time to be ported to.


# Curious about mod updates? 
We're moving our trello page over to Monday.com, this will take a bit of organising.

# Questions and answers
<details>
<summary> Show me! </summary>

- Will the mod be ported to Forge?

> We are thinking of moving to Forge if the mod size keeps expanding at this rate.

---

- Will there ever be some kind of 'guide book' to help players understand the gems?

> Recipes can now be viewed using REI, which is a soft-dependency going forward. Gem loottable viewing will be possible in an upcoming update (1.5 >)

---

- Will the mod ever be backported to < 1.19.4?

> No, hard no.

</details>

# Gems
You can find gems all over the minecraft world:

<details>
<summary>Click here for more info on each gem</summary>

> Overworld
> - Petrinite: a gem that is held together by roots and flowers around its location, found in swamps and lush caves.
> - Antholium: a gem that forms only in the warmest of ocean climates. usually surrounded by coral.
> - Spironite: a cold gem, only generating in the coldest of biomes, or the highest of mountains.
> - Dyanite: A shiny gem that can be found in and around the deepslate layers.
> - Ruby: a gem that can be found underground.
> - Cobgalite: a gem that is easily mistaken as a rock, can be found in the deepslate layers.
> - Sculk chitin: a mass of chitin and sculk, only found in the deep dark.
> - Amalgamite: a mass of ores bundled together into one, can be found in the stone layer.

> Nether
> - Slagodite: a gem that can be found in nether wastes, crimson forests and basalt deltas!
> - Jadestone: a warped gem that can only be found in warped forests.
> - Biolium: a gem that can be found inside the crimson forests and wastes, held together by biological material.
> - Runian: a gem formed by souls inside the soul sand valleys, you can kill a mob on top of soul sand or soil for a chance to create this ore!

> End
> - Denarium: a gem which has unknown origins, can be found on the outer end islands
> - Glazonium: a gem filled with beautiful Prismarine, can be found on the outer end islands.
</details>

# Can I use this mod in Modpacks?
Absolutely, make sure to keep the mod up-to-date when you do!
